resources.string: Search by title, number or lyrics\u2026
No internet connection. Please check your network and try again.
Connection timed out. The server may be slow. Please try again.
Received invalid data from the server. Please try again later.
The server is experiencing issues. Please try again later.
Access denied. Please try again later.
Hymn data not found on the server.
Could not load hymns (error %d). Please try again.
Could not load hymns. Please check your internet connection and try again.
